location: Inside a chest on the back of a stranded carriage along the road northwest of the Caelem Ruins Site of Grace in Caelid, guarded by Giant Dogs.
tactics: From the Caelem Ruins grace, follow the road northwest until you spot the parked carriage.
One or more Giant Dogs guard the wagon — they hit hard and travel in packs, so deal with them before or while looting the chest.
Caelid has several similar roadside carriages; make sure you're northwest of Caelem Ruins and not confusing it with wagons south near the Minor Erdtree.
lore: A crude, heavy slab of an ultra-greatsword, valued less for craftsmanship than for the sheer weight it carries through a swing, mowing down anything in its path.

builds.name: Early Pure-Strength Beater
builds.why: High base attack power and strong Strength scaling make it a reliable, easy-to-find Strength weapon well before rarer colossal swords turn up.

builds.name: Infusion Testbed
builds.why: Unlike most named colossal swords it accepts any Ash of War and any affinity, making it a flexible platform for Quality, Keen, or elemental colossal-sword builds.
